title: Algorithm Score Walkthrough
subtitle: Score a post before you publish it

scenes.caption: Open Algorithm Score and frame the tool.
scenes.narration: Algorithm Score lets you pressure test a post before it goes live, so you can spot weak hooks, missing payoff, or format problems before they cost reach.
scenes.overlay_body: Pressure test the post before you publish it.

scenes.caption: Paste in the draft.
scenes.narration: Drop in the exact post you want to analyze. The tool grades the content through an X-specific performance lens instead of generic writing advice.
scenes.overlay_body: Score the exact post before it ships.

actions.text: Bo Nix is processing faster because Sean Payton finally built the offense around timing and clarity instead of asking the rookie to solve chaos after the snap.

scenes.caption: Run the grade.
scenes.narration: Hit Grades and the app scores the post, highlights the biggest weakness, and suggests a tighter rewrite you can use right away.
scenes.overlay_body: Get a score, the top fix, and an optimized rewrite.
